ddls:
CREATE TABLE "workers" (
  "worker_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each worker */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the worker */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the worker */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the worker */,
  "worker_type" TEXT /* Type of worker (e.g., carpenter, electrician) */,
  "caretaker_id" INTEGER /* ID of the caretaker overseeing the worker */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the worker */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the worker */,
  "availability_status" TEXT /* Current availability status of the worker */,
  "emergency_contact" TEXT /* Emergency contact number of the worker */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the worker joined the company */,
  "certifications" TEXT /* Certifications held by the worker */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("worker_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_workers_caretaker_id FOREIGN KEY ("caretaker_id") REFERENCES caretakers ("caretaker_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "caretakers" (
  "caretaker_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each caretaker */,
  "caretaker_name" TEXT /* Full name of the caretaker */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the caretaker */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the caretaker belongs to */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the caretaker */,
  "date_hired" TEXT /* Date the caretaker was hired */,
  "supervisor" INTEGER /* ID of the supervisor overseeing the caretaker */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("caretaker_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_caretakers_supervisor FOREIGN KEY ("supervisor") REFERENCES caretakers ("caretaker_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project (e.g., ongoing, completed) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Physical location of the project */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the project */,
  "client_name" TEXT /* Name of the client for the project */,
  "project_manager" INTEGER /* ID of the project manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_project_manager FOREIGN KEY ("project_manager") REFERENCES caretakers ("caretaker_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assignment */,
  "worker_id" INTEGER /* ID of the worker assigned to the project */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the worker is assigned to */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the worker in the project */,
  "assignment_date" TEXT /* Date when the assignment was made */,
  "expected_hours" REAL /* Expected number of hours for the assignment */,
  "completion_status" TEXT /* Completion status of the assignment (e.g., ongoing, completed, delayed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assignments_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assignments_worker_id FOREIGN KEY ("worker_id") REFERENCES workers ("worker_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "manager" TEXT /* Manager of the department */,
  "location" TEXT /* Physical location of the department */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "work_hours" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each work log */,
  "worker_id" INTEGER /* ID of the worker who logged hours */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the hours were logged for */,
  "hours_worked" REAL /* Total hours worked by the worker */,
  "log_date" TEXT /* Date of the work log */,
  "overtime_hours" REAL /* Overtime hours worked by the worker */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the person who approved the work hours */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_work_hours_worker_id FOREIGN KEY ("worker_id") REFERENCES workers ("worker_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_work_hours_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_work_hours_approved_by FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by") REFERENCES caretakers ("caretaker_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "worker_id" INTEGER /* ID of the worker being reviewed */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date of the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given to the worker (e.g., 1-5 stars) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments regarding the worker's performance */,
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the person who conducted the review */,
  "review_type" TEXT /* Type of review (e.g., annual, mid-year) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_reviews_reviewer_id FOREIGN KEY ("reviewer_id") REFERENCES caretakers ("caretaker_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_reviews_worker_id FOREIGN KEY ("worker_id") REFERENCES workers ("worker_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., Admin, Supervisor) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username used for system login */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for account security */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date and time */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "safety_training" (
  "training_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each training record */,
  "worker_id" INTEGER /* ID of the worker who completed the training */,
  "training_date" TEXT /* Date on which the training was completed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the training (e.g., completed, pending) */,
  "trainer" TEXT /* Name of the trainer who conducted the training */,
  "training_type" TEXT /* Type of training (e.g., first aid, fire safety) */,
  "training_duration" REAL /* Duration of the training in hours */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("training_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_safety_training_worker_id FOREIGN KEY ("worker_id") REFERENCES workers ("worker_id")
)
